description: Phase 14a entropy re-analysis. Localized entropy variants (answer-token, last-10-tokens) unavailable: Phase 13 sampling stored only response-mean scalar, not per-token arrays. ROC-AUC and gate analysis use mean/std/min of response-mean entropy. Grid oracle and updated gate ceiling captures in gate_summary files.

Qwen2.5-7B.LOCALIZATION_NOTE: Per-token logprob arrays NOT stored in Phase 13 sampling. True localized entropy (final-answer-token, last-10-tokens) is not computable from stored data. Only response-mean mean_token_entropy scalar is available per sample.

roc_auc.interpretation: AUC = P(signal_backfire > signal_gain). Higher signal = predict backfire. AUC > 0.5: backfire problems have higher entropy.

overlap_description.mean_entropy: weak tendency for backfire problems to have higher entropy (AUC=0.631)
overlap_description.std_entropy: weak tendency for backfire problems to have higher entropy (AUC=0.602)
overlap_description.min_entropy: weak tendency for backfire problems to have higher entropy (AUC=0.616)

entropy_gate_k4_sweep.NOTE_A3: Best ceiling capture is the MAXIMUM over the threshold sweep (best-case gate performance). Reported for comparability with PH4.

Llama-3-8B.LOCALIZATION_NOTE: Per-token logprob arrays NOT stored in Phase 13 sampling. True localized entropy (final-answer-token, last-10-tokens) is not computable from stored data. Only response-mean mean_token_entropy scalar is available per sample.

roc_auc.interpretation: AUC = P(signal_backfire > signal_gain). Higher signal = predict backfire. AUC > 0.5: backfire problems have higher entropy.

entropy_gate_k4_sweep.NOTE_A3: Best ceiling capture is the MAXIMUM over the threshold sweep (best-case gate performance). Reported for comparability with PH4.

exploratory.NOTE_A3: All entropy/agreement gate ceiling-capture values in phase-13 analysis are the MAXIMUM over the respective threshold sweep (best-case gate performance against the binary oracle). Grid-oracle ceiling captures below recompute against the wider denominator.

confirmatory.NOTE_A3: All entropy/agreement gate ceiling-capture values in phase-13 analysis are the MAXIMUM over the respective threshold sweep (best-case gate performance against the binary oracle). Grid-oracle ceiling captures below recompute against the wider denominator.
